mapper.select: SELECT l.*, g.name as grade_name FROM levels l LEFT JOIN grades g ON l.grade_id=g.id WHERE l.id=#{id}
SELECT l.*, g.name as grade_name FROM levels l LEFT JOIN grades g ON l.grade_id=g.id WHERE l.grade_id=#{gradeId} ORDER BY l.sort_order, l.id
SELECT question_id FROM level_questions WHERE level_id=#{levelId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO levels (name, grade_id, theme, difficulty, required_kps, question_count, pass_score, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{gradeId}, #{theme}, #{difficulty}, #{requiredKps}, #{questionCount}, #{passScore}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE levels SET name=#{name}, theme=#{theme}, difficulty=#{difficulty}, required_kps=#{requiredKps}, question_count=#{questionCount}, pass_score=#{passScore}, sort_order=#{sortOrder} WHERE id=#{id}
